long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between fas05b.sr01.par04 Et33/1 <-> fcr01b.par04 Et3/5. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19908
short_description: fas05b.sr01.par04 Et33/1 <-> fcr01b.par04 Et3/5 | Link Flap
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via automation.)
